reviews.review_description: Really cute one control basis game! Until level 11 then u hav a wall blocking where u can’t see when to run them across the road and if u can’t see it how do u knw when to run them??? And guessedright one time and after the last goes thru where u move to the next crossing it’snormal again??? Plz fix caus very simple but cute crossing game and hopeing u don’t hav to guess and supposed to b  that way caus if so nahhhhh refund me and yep, even when only cost 2$ caus it doesn’t makesense to keep on dying over and over again. If fixed or some response bk will b changing stars to mor Asa when it does happen 😬
